headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) After Its 80% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Hewlett Packard Enterprise stock still offers value after a strong run, the next step is to look closely at what the market is paying for each dollar of its fundamentals. At a recent share price of US$29.70, Hewlett Packard Enterprise has recorded returns of 3.2% over the last 7 days, 20.6% over 30 days, 22.9% year to date, 80.5% over 1 year, 133.9% over 3 years and 113.9% over 5 years.
